name: Vutrisiran
summary: Subcutaneous RNA interference therapeutic that lowers hepatic transthyretin production, with phase 3 ATTR-CM outcome evidence.
mechanism_summary: Suppresses hepatic TTR synthesis to reduce production of amyloid-forming transthyretin; it lowers precursor supply rather than directly depleting existing deposits.

open_questions: How precursor suppression interacts with existing amyloid burden over long follow-up
How monotherapy and add-on-to-tafamidis benefits should be separated
